description: The Mullen Gang was an Irish-American street gang operating in South Boston, Massachusetts, founded in the 1950s. Engaged in racketeering, armed robbery, auto theft, and burglary, it fought a decade-long war with the Killeen Gang for control of criminal rackets. In 1972, both gangs were consolidated under the Winter Hill Gang. The gang derived its name from a commemorative plaque to war hero John Joseph Mullen.
